title: Add all missing weather info to conditions panel
description: The conditions panel currently omits several weather fields returned by the API: humidity, wave direction, and wave period. Precipitation is also hidden when zero. The user wants all weather information to be displayed.

plan.summary:
Enhance the conditions panel to display all weather data returned by the Open-Meteo API. Currently the panel omits humidity, wave direction, and wave period, and hides precipitation when it's zero. We'll update the `updateConditionsPanel` function in `sailing-weather.js` to show all available data fields, making the panel a comprehensive weather overview.

Requirements:
1. Add humidity (%) to the conditions panel
2. Add wave direction (as compass bearing) to the waves row
3. Add wave period (seconds) to the conditions panel
4. Always show precipitation (even when 0mm)
5. Keep the existing styling and layout consistent

Assumptions:
- Wave direction will be shown as a compass direction (e.g. "NW") next to wave height, similar to how wind direction is shown
- Wave period will be shown in seconds
- Humidity will be shown as a percentage
- The panel order will be: Wind, Gusts, Beaufort, Temperature, Humidity, Pressure, Waves (height + direction), Wave Period, Precipitation, Cloud Cover

steps.description: Update the `updateConditionsPanel` function in `sailing-weather.js` to add humidity row after temperature, expand the waves row to include wave direction (using the existing `degToCompass` helper), add a wave period row after waves, and always show precipitation even when 0mm. (req 1, 2, 3, 4, 5)
Take a screenshot to verify the conditions panel shows all weather fields correctly with proper formatting and styling. (req 1–5)
